category_title: Students with cerebral palsy and hearing impairment focused on communication goals
scenario_title: Setting goals and preparing for group discussion
minimal_context: Jason is reviewing his notes to identify goals for improvement before starting a group discussion in Chinese class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Before we start the group discussion for Chinese class, please look at your notes and identify your goals for improvement.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Shows very low initial motivation) We have to be confident.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What else do you need to do to prepare for the group work?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I have to answer questions; I have to pay more attention to classmates’ speaking.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Any difficulties that you might encounter?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Feeling nervous, he writes down in his notes: confidence, practice, endurance, communication with people) I shouldn’t make all my classmates wait for me.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Before we start the group discussion for Chinese class, please look at your notes and identify your goals for improvement.

STUDENT: (Shows very low initial motivation) We have to be confident.

TUTOR: What else do you need to do to prepare for the group work?

STUDENT: I have to answer questions; I have to pay more attention to classmates’ speaking.

TUTOR: Any difficulties that you might encounter?

STUDENT: (Feeling nervous, he writes down in his notes: confidence, practice, endurance, communication with people) I shouldn’t make all my classmates wait for me.
